{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Eraser Blade
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Eraser Blade]] is a focused, efficient [[Combat Art]] for putting pressure on a single opponent.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
